source_jobs.title: QA Engineer - Puzzle & Midcore Games
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT VOODOO

Founded in 2013, Voodoo is a tech company that creates mobile games and apps with a mission to entertain the world. Gathering 800 employees, 7 billion downloads, and over 200 million active users, Voodoo is the #3 mobile publisher worldwide in terms of downloads after Google and Meta. Our portfolio includes chart-topping games like Mob Control and Paper.io 2, alongside popular apps such as BeReal and Wizz.

This position is Paris-based (we can provide relocation support).




TEAM

You will be an integral part of a newly established internal studio, a dynamic and focused team dedicated to one of our most promising prototype in scale (either Puzzle or Midcore). This studio is specifically chartered to improve this high-potential game up to the successful and market-ready title it is meant to become. 




ROLE

As a Quality Assistance Engineer at Voodoo, you will lead our approach to maintain our game health and free of defects.

Together with the rest of the team, you will be in charge of testing the game and minimizing the number of defects in it:

 - Conduct comprehensive testing of our mobile games to identify and document crucial defects, taking ownership of the entire QA process to assure quality and user experience

 - Assist in creating processes and tools to improve the overall quality of the game

 - Follow the technical KPIs of our live games and propose strategies to continuously improve them

 - Coordinate closely with design and development teams, understanding game mechanics and providing essential feedback to improve and refine the product

 - Prioritize and execute testing tasks efficiently at different development stages, aligning with project timelines and objectives while independently addressing and resolving issues found

 - Foster an open feedback culture, actively participating in constructive dialogue with team members to facilitate collaboration and innovation

 - Work with our central tech teams in quality-related initiatives.




PROFILE

 - 3+ years as a QA Engineer in Mobile Games, demonstrating ownership and successful project completion

 - Strong problem-solving skills with the ability to take up tasks from start to finish with little assistance and identify and address issues independently and effectively

 - Reliable self-starter and team player, capable of taking responsibility and contributing positively to team dynamics

 - Passion for mobile games with insight into the player's perspective and expectations

 - Proven experience using various testing tools and methodologies for mobile games

 - Clear communication skills with the ability to articulate complex ideas to various stakeholders effectively

 - Good understanding of Free-to-Play (F2P) games and game design principles and release management experience are a plus

 - Fluent English (speaking and writing)




BENEFITS

 - Competitive salary

 - Premium healthcare (SideCare) for you and your family 100% borne by Voodoo

 - Swile Lunch voucher

 - Gymlib (100% borne by Voodoo)

 - Wellness activities in our Paris office

 - Child daycare facilities (Les Petits Chaperons rouges)

source_jobs.title: Game Developer - Puzzle Games
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT VOODOO

Founded in 2013, Voodoo is a tech company that creates mobile games and apps with a mission to entertain the world. Gathering 800 employees, 7 billion downloads, and over 200 million active users, Voodoo is the #3 mobile publisher worldwide in terms of downloads after Google and Meta. Our portfolio includes chart-topping games like Mob Control and Block Jam, alongside popular apps such as BeReal and Wizz.




TEAM

You will be an integral part of a newly established internal studio, a dynamic and focused team dedicated to one of our most promising prototype in scale. This studio is specifically chartered to improve this high-potential game up to the successful and market-ready title it is meant to become. 



In this exciting role, your initial focus will be on one of our new Puzzle Games that have already demonstrated significant promise and captured our attention with their compelling core mechanics and engaging gameplay.




ROLE

We are looking for a senior Unity C# Game Developer who has been a primary contributor to the Game architecture, Feature development, and design for several casual games. You will collaborate with a variety of experts: Product Managers, Game Artists, Game Developers, Tech Engineers, Monetization Managers, Data Analysts...



 - Work closely with small teams of Unity Game Developers and Artists

 - Implement game logic and systems in C# using Unity

 - Adapt and work within an existing code base, enhancing its functionality, stability and performance

 - Provide guidance and share your expertise

 - Ensure timely delivery of high-quality results




PROFILE

 - Advanced Unity knowledge (3y+) including scripting in C#, UI systems, animation, particle systems, etc.

 - A critical thinker and a problem solver with a keen eye for identifying problems in workflows and processes (and driving them to a resolution)

 - Previous experience and exposure to the game production process (as part of a game dev studio or otherwise)

 - Skilled in identifying performance bottlenecks and implementing optimisations, with a strong focus on memory management, frame rate stability, and reducing load times

 - Experience with analytics-driven development and A/B testing in live games would be a plus

 - Excellent communication skills and a strong teamwork mindset

 - Good sense of gameplay experience and special attention to detail

 - Speak and write English




BENEFITS

 - Competitive salary

 - Premium healthcare (SideCare) for you and your family 100% borne by Voodoo

 - Swile Lunch voucher

 - Gymlib (100% borne by Voodoo)

 - Wellness activities in our Paris office

 - Child daycare facilities (Les Petits Chaperons rouges)

source_jobs.title: Publishing Manager - Vietnam
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT VOODOO

Founded in 2013, Voodoo is a tech company that creates mobile games and apps with a mission to entertain the world. Gathering 800 employees, 7 billion downloads, and over 200 million active users, Voodoo is the #3 mobile publisher worldwide in terms of downloads after Google and Meta. Our portfolio includes chart-topping games like Mob Control and Block Jam, alongside popular apps such as BeReal and Wizz.




TEAM

Our Gaming team is made up of hybrid-casual, casual and midcore experts. Our 'Core' games team supports internal and external studios worldwide in creating, developing and launching new hit games, whilst our 'Live' games team focuses on delivering higher engagement on our existing and successful games.

With over seven billion downloads worldwide and a portfolio of hybrid games each aiming for $100m+ per year, we are the largest and most successful hybrid publisher in the world.

Within Core, Publishing supports internal and external studios worldwide in creating and launching hybrid-casual hits.




ROLE

You will join a small and high performing team and your main responsibilities will be:

 - Create a strong local network of studios and be the face of Voodoo in the SEA market

 - Partner with top local studios

 - Manage your games throughout their whole lifecycle, from ideation to scale

 - Work exclusively with 15 studios on ideation, prototypes and prototype iterations

 - Own multiple game launches and their product roadmaps each quarter, along with game P&L

 - Be a part of Voodoo's front line in product management and games publishing




PROFILE

 - You hold a masters degree from a top tier Business/engineering school

 - You have 3+ years experience in a fast-paced environment (Top-tier consulting firm, Top-tier Investment Banking, Start-up)

 - You can work in autonomy and are eager to build up a business from scratch

 - You are ambitious and want to grow with your business

 - You are passionate about consumer products and/or gaming

 - Excellent analytical and communication skills

 - Great interpersonal skills and openness to feedback

 - Fluency in English and Vietnamese

 - You have a passion outside of work (art and crafts, music..)




BENEFITS

 - Best-in-class compensation

 - Unparalleled performance-based bonus scheme

 - Other benefits according to the country you reside

source_jobs.title: Publishing Manager - Türkiye
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT VOODOO

Founded in 2013, Voodoo is a tech company that creates mobile games and apps with a mission to entertain the world. Gathering 800 employees, 7 billion downloads, and over 200 million active users, Voodoo is the #3 mobile publisher worldwide in terms of downloads after Google and Meta. Our portfolio includes chart-topping games like Mob Control and Block Jam, alongside popular apps such as BeReal and Wizz.




TEAM 

Our Publishing team plays a strategic role in the company’s growth and serves as a launchpad for Voodoo’s future leaders. The team brings together top performers from consulting, finance, and tech with a passion for product, creativity, and execution.

As part of Voodoo Gaming, we partner with studios to build games from initial concept to global launch, aiming to create the next wave of iconic, chart-topping hybrid-casual hits. With over eight billion downloads and counting, Voodoo is the world’s largest and most successful hybrid-casual publisher.

You will join a small and high-performing team, and your main responsibilities will include:




ROLE

 - Building and nurturing Voodoo’s presence in Türkiye by developing strong relationships across the local gaming ecosystem(s)

 - Building and managing a portfolio of high-potential studios through outreach, industry events, and partnerships

 - Guiding studios on product strategy and creative direction to build strong, marketable prototypes

 - Leading launches as a product director by forming the product vision, roadmap, and execution to scale successful titles

 - Owning the full P&L of your games, with a sharp focus on growth and profitability

 - Driving deep market and competitive analysis to identify trends and define what we should build next




PROFILE

 - Master’s degree from a top-tier business or engineering school

 - 3+ years in a fast-paced, analytical environment (e.g. consulting, banking, tech, or startups)

 - Strong strategic thinking, product sense, and analytical skills

 - Passionate about gaming and consumer products

 - Comfortable owning complex projects and working autonomously

 - Excellent communication and interpersonal skills

 - Fluent in English; Turkish

 - Personal passion or creative interest outside of work




BENEFITS

 - Competitive salary upon experience

 - Multinet Lunch voucher

 - Premium healthcare coverage for you and your family 

 - Gym reimbursement

source_jobs.title: Performance Marketing Manager - Apps
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT VOODOO

Founded in 2013, Voodoo is a tech company that creates apps and mobile games with a mission to entertain the world. Gathering 800 employees, 7 billion downloads, and over 200 million active users, Voodoo is the #3 mobile publisher worldwide in terms of downloads after Google and Meta. Our portfolio includes popular apps such as BeReal and Wizz, alongside chart-topping games like Mob Control, Block Jam & more.




TEAM



Our Growth team is a transversal entity aiming to maximize and deliver the potential of any mobile product. It combines user acquisition, creative content production, monetization, and the tech capabilities required to turn applications into global hits. With over 150 experts, we operate at the forefront of mobile marketing and ad tech across consumer and social apps.




ROLE

Voodoo is looking for an Performance Marketing Manager to own user acquisition activities on a portfolio of consumer and social apps. Leading you own portfolio of  Apps, you will leverage your expertise and creativity to turn great mobile products into global hits.

 - Plan and manage UA campaigns for multiple apps

 - Analyze the performance of our campaigns, identify the most relevant signals, and increase the ROAS of our apps

 - Work closely with our Product and Creative teams to coordinate efforts and share feedback

 - Use our suite of internal growth tools and interface with our Tech team to continuously improve them

 - Deepen your UA expertise and share best practices with other teams to keep our organization at the forefront of growth innovation

 - Lead transversal projects




PROFILE

 - You have experience in performance marketing and paid acquisition, in application or gaming companies

 - You have a successful track record with ROAS strategies on mobile games and/ or apps

 - You’re intimately familiar with user acquisition platforms (Facebook Ads, AdMob, AppLovin, TikTok, DSPs, etc.) and MMPs (Appsflyer, Adjust, etc.)

 - You’re well-versed with experimentation methodologies and processes

 - You have experience with influencer marketing and ASO

 - You’re a hacker: you’ve already tried innovative organic/ viral tactics

 - You speak and write English fluently

 - You wish to work in an environment that values candor, freedom, and responsibility




BENEFITS

 - Competitive salary 

 - Premium healthcare (SideCare) for you and your family 100% borne by Voodoo

 - Swile Lunch voucher

 - Gymlib (100% borne by Voodoo)

 - Wellness activities in our Paris office

 - Flexible vacation policy

 - Remote days

 - Child daycare facilities (Les Petits Chaperons rouges)

source_jobs.title: Lead Creative Manager - Gaming
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT VOODOO

Founded in 2013, Voodoo is a tech company that creates mobile games and apps with a mission to entertain the world. Gathering 800 employees, 7 billion downloads, and over 200 million active users, Voodoo is the #3 mobile publisher worldwide in terms of downloads after Google and Meta. Our portfolio includes chart-topping games like Mob Control and Block Jam, alongside popular apps such as BeReal and Wizz.




TEAM

Our Growth team helps maximize the potential of each Voodoo product within the ecosystem. Our Growth team is split into several job expertise such as user acquisition, ad monetization, video ads, playable ads, and influencer marketers. Being part of the Growth Team at Voodoo requires a lot of operational excellence and creativity in order to constantly adapt ourselves to stay ahead of the rest of the market.




ROLE

Voodoo is looking for a Lead Creative Manager to lead a squad of creative operators. You will own creative production for a large scope of our games or apps and play a central role in helping Voodoo turn great mobile products into global hits.

 - Prioritize and drive creative production for multiple games based on product and user acquisition strategy

 - Analyze your team’s performance, define action plans, and hit your KPIs

 - Lead up to 6 people: recruit, coach, and increase talent density

 - Discover new creative concepts, and share best practices with other creative teams

 - Lead key projects to test new tools, improve processes, etc.




PROFILE

 - You have 6+ years of experience in creative performance marketing, in the gaming and/or mobile apps industry

 - You have an extensive track record of managing a team in a creative field

 - You’ve successfully led high-impact projects

 - You speak and write English fluently

 - You wish to work in an environment that values candor, freedom, and responsibility




BENEFITS

 - Competitive salary 

 - Premium healthcare (SideCare) for you and your family 100% borne by Voodoo

 - Swile Lunch voucher

 - Wellness activities in our Paris office

source_jobs.title: Ad Monetization Manager - Gaming
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT VOODOO

Founded in 2013, Voodoo is a tech company that creates mobile games and apps with a mission to entertain the world. Gathering 800 employees, 7 billion downloads, and over 200 million active users, Voodoo is the #3 mobile publisher worldwide in terms of downloads after Google and Meta. Our portfolio includes chart-topping games like Mob Control and Block Jam, alongside popular apps such as BeReal and Wizz.




TEAM

Our Growth team helps maximize the potential of each Voodoo product within the ecosystem. The team is split into several job expertise such as user acquisition, ad monetization, video ads, playable ads, and influencer marketers. Being part of the Growth Team at Voodoo requires a lot of operational excellence and creativity in order to constantly adapt ourselves to stay ahead of the rest of the market.




ROLE

 - Manage ad monetization strategy across a variety of ad networks and demand partners 

 - Design and operate AdOps processes for many games via major ad mediation platforms

 - Work with studios to improve the overall monetization strategy of our games, including iAP, subscription, etc.

 - Deeply analyze monetization performance against key metrics to identify areas for improvement 

 - Run A/B tests to optimize monetization efforts: test from A to Z, analyze results and leverage them

 - Make recommendations to influence the product, create new ad placements, new user segmentation strategies, and optimize ad integrations to impact the LTV of users

 - Communicate with strategic partners & ad network contacts to build/maintain strong relationships

 - Liaise with our internal teams for tech-related topics: SDK integrations, data and dashboarding, automation needs




PROFILE

 - At least 5 years experience in ad monetization, within a top studio

 - Data-driven and detail-oriented, with strong analytical and organization skills

 - Ability to develop proactive and efficient responses to pressing issues and challenges

 - Advanced knowledge of Excel

 - Experience in statistical analysis tools is an advantage

 - A hacker and creative mindset

 - Fluency in English ; French is a plus

 - Understanding of the mobile gaming competitive landscape and mobile ad tech ecosystem is a big plus




BENEFITS

 - Premium healthcare (SideCare) for you and your family 100% borne by Voodoo

 - Gymlib (100% borne by Voodoo)

source_jobs.title: Senior Back-end Engineer Node.Js - Wizz
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT VOODOO

Founded in 2013, Voodoo is a tech company that creates mobile games and apps with a mission to entertain the world. Gathering 800 employees, 7 billion downloads, and over 200 million active users, Voodoo is the #3 mobile publisher worldwide in terms of downloads after Google and Meta. Our portfolio includes chart-topping games like Mob Control and Block Jam, alongside popular apps such as BeReal and Wizz.




TEAM

Our Consumer Apps teams are at the forefront of crafting innovative and engaging apps for daily enjoyment.

Our ambition extends beyond gaming to entertain a global audience. Millions of people around the world, especially in the US, download and use the apps we create.



You'll be working on Wizz, a social app specifically designed for teens, boasting over 3 million monthly active users in the US and UK. Wizz is a friend-finding and chat app where young people can safely express themselves and connect with like-minded peers in an authentic, pressure-free environment. Unlike other social media platforms that focus on followers, posts, or passive consumption, Wizz offers young people a space to have meaningful 1:1 conversations with peers.

As a member of a high-performing team of 20, you'll collaborate to further scale and enhance Wizz, fostering a spirit of goodwill and creativity. As Wizz continues its dynamic growth and development, we are seeking an ambitious Senior Backend Engineer to join.






ROLE

We are looking for :

 - A Senior Backend Engineer who is not only technically strong but also eager to contribute to the product vision and actively participate in decision-making. You won’t just be writing code, you’ll have a key role in shaping the architecture, scalability, and long-term strategy of Wizz. Your ability to think beyond execution and take ownership will be crucial: we want someone who is proactive, challenges assumptions, and collaborates with product and engineering teams to create a robust, scalable, and innovative platform.




YOUR MISSION:

 - Own the backend architecture, ensuring scalability, performance, and reliability for millions of users.

 - Collaborate closely with product teams to shape and influence product decisions with a strong technical perspective.

 - Design, implement, deploy, and maintain highly scalable and available backend systems, including features that enhance user safety and content moderation.

 - Integrate and manage third-party services (e.g., analytics, moderation, cloud tools) to ensure a secure and seamless user experience.

 - Define and promote best practices in reliability, observability, and infrastructure management.

 - Contribute to backend infrastructure evolution, ensuring that it supports rapid product iterations, responsible growth, and a safe environment for our users.

 - Improve system performance and scalability, particularly around high-traffic distributed systems.




OUR STACK

 - Language and libraries: Node.js, Fastify, Socket.io http://socket.io/, Go, Firebase

 - Databases: MongoDB, Redis

 - Infrastructure: Cloud Run, Pub/Sub, S3, CloudFront, Big Query

 - Ops: Github Action, AWS CLI, gcloud CLI, Docker, microservice architecture

 - iOS: XCode, GitHub, Cocoapods (public and private)




PROFILE

 - Passion for the mobile consumer industry

 - Be fluent in French

 - Excellent back-end programming skills (5+ years experience)

 - Interest in Node.JS http://Node.JS (vanilla)

 - Professional GCP or AWS expertise 

 - Experience building APIs

 - Experience with high traffic and distributed systems architectures

 - Familiarity with services & technologies used in our Stack

 - Track record with a social media application is a plus

 - DevOps skills (Terraform, Cloud formation, …), are a plus




BENEFITS

 - Competitive salary upon experience

 - Swile Lunch voucher

 - Gymlib (100% borne by Voodoo)

 - Premium healthcare coverage SideCare, for your family 100% borne by Voodoo

 - Wellness activities in our Paris office

source_jobs.title: Growth - Playables Associate - Intern
source_jobs.description:
Founded in 2013, Voodoo is a tech company that creates mobile games and apps with a mission to entertain the world. Gathering 900 employees, 7 billion downloads, and over 200 million active users, Voodoo is the #3 mobile publisher worldwide in terms of downloads after Google and Meta. Our portfolio includes chart-topping games like Mob Control and Block Jam, alongside popular apps such as BeReal and Wizz.

 

Team

 

Our Growth team helps maximize the potential of each Voodoo product within the ecosystem. The team is split into several job expertise such as user acquisition, ad monetization, video ads, playable ads, and influencer marketers. Being part of the Growth Team at Voodoo requires a lot of operational excellence and creativity in order to constantly adapt ourselves to stay ahead of the rest of the market.

The Playable Ads team sits within our Growth org and turns mobile games into fully interactive ad experiences: mini-games that run inside an ad unit and make people stop scrolling. Our work directly drives millions of downloads worldwide. We obsess over performance, creativity, and staying ahead of market trends, and we do it fast.

 

Role

To succeed in this role, you will need to have a good understanding of the casual mobile game market and mobile advertising, as well as the interactive ads marketing. You will join a high-performing team and:

 - Editing video content for high-performing mobile ads

 - Creating 2D assets and UI visuals for ad creatives

 - Benchmarking competitor ads and keeping tabs on social media trends

 - Tracking and documenting performance data for every ad you produce

 - Pitching new ideas and creative concepts (yes, your voice matters here)
   
    

Profile

 - Good understanding of the casual mobile game market and mobile advertising

 - Ability to create clean 2D assets in Photoshop

 - A sharp eye for social media trends and mobile marketing

 - You work independently, solve problems creatively, and don't wait to be told what to do

 - Fluent in English and French

 - Genuine interest in the mobile gaming world

 

Logistics

 - Start: ASAP

 - Duration: 6 months minimum

 - Location: Paris (on-site)

source_jobs.title: Marketing Unity Developer - Growth
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT VOODOO



Founded in 2013, Voodoo is a tech company that creates mobile games and apps with a mission to entertain the world. With 1000 employees, 7 billion downloads, and over 200 million active users, Voodoo is the #3 mobile publisher worldwide in terms of downloads after Google and Meta. Our portfolio includes chart-topping games like Mob Control and Paper.io, alongside popular apps such as BeReal and Wizz.




TEAM



Our Growth team is a transversal entity aiming to maximize and deliver the potential of any mobile product. It combines user acquisition, creative content production, monetization, and the tech capabilities required to turn applications into global hits. With over 150 experts, we operate at the forefront of mobile marketing and ad tech across various types of games (hypercasual, hybrid, 100% IAP).



Being part of the Growth Team at Voodoo requires both operational excellence and creativity in order to constantly adapt ourselves and stay ahead of the market.




ROLE



This role is in our Creative Squad https://voodoo.notion.site/Meet-our-Creative-team-0a3e236b591848a088e1c76fb22c0633?pvs=74: The one responsible for producing high-performing video ads that drive user acquisition. This team plays a pivotal role at the base of the marketing funnel, transforming our games into compelling visual narratives that capture attention across global platforms.



Working across a wide variety of game genres (hypercasual, hybrid, casual) including puzzle, match-3, runner, war games and more, you will:



 - Use Unity to modify and iterate on 20+ game projects, adapting gameplay to make it attractive and engaging for advertising campaigns

 - Design custom setups (animations, scenes, environments, skins, rebranding, code changes) for creative video production

 - Record, edit, and upload gameplay videos for global ad campaigns to be tested

 - Share modified game builds with the marketing team for testing

 - Analyze ad performance and benchmark competitors to improve creative output



This role is a unique chance to grow your technical skills by prototyping and problem-solving across multiple projects, as well as to develop a sharp marketing perspective on what makes a game successful.




PROFILE



 - You have a strong sense of ownership and adaptability

 - You have excellent Unity skills

 - You are interested in casual games

 - You have a creative and hacker mindset

 - You have basic notions in 2D/3D graphics design and modeling skills (Photoshop, Blender...), deeper proficiency is a plus

 - You have a good level of spoken and written English (French is not required)
   
   


BENEFITS



Competitive salary and other benefits according to the country you reside in.



Full remote for candidates based abroad, with relocation to Paris subject to discussion. Hybrid for candidates based in France.

source_jobs.title: Account Executive - WeMoms
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT VOODOO



Founded in 2013, Voodoo is a tech company that creates mobile games and apps with a mission to entertain the world. Gathering 800 employees, 7 billion downloads, and over 200 million active users, Voodoo is the #3 mobile publisher worldwide in terms of downloads after Google and Meta. Our portfolio includes chart-topping games like Mob Control and Block Jam, alongside popular apps such as BeReal and Wizz.




TEAM

At WeMoms, we understand the complexities of motherhood. More than an app, we're a guiding compass for mothers globally, making motherhood feel intuitive and supported. Our vision is to create an ever-present circle of trust, wisdom, and support for every mom.We deliver personalized, empowering guidance and resources to mothers at every stage of their journey.



Our partnership with Voodoo, a global leader in mobile gaming and apps, propels us on a hyper growth path.  We are a passionate team of 30 professionals. As we embark on this exciting growth phase, we're looking for talented individuals to join us in shaping the future of motherhood support.

If you're driven to make a real difference in mothers' lives and thrive in a rapidly growing tech environment, we invite you to be part of our journey. Help us entertain and support the world, one mother at a time.




ROLE

WeMoms is looking to grow its sales team in France to drive ad sales to agencies and brands. As WeMoms’ Sales Manager, you will be responsible for designing and executing the sales strategy by selling traditional and innovative ad inventory to key brands.




KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

 - Identify, source, pitch, define, negotiate, close, and manage digital advertising revenue

 - Build awareness and adoption around WeMoms offering with client presentations, conference attendance and networking events.

 - Combine new business development and sales skills with long-term relationship management.

 - Engage with small and mid-market clients to drive deal growth in the long-term.

 - Communicate effectively internally to coordinate resources (Ads Ops, Account managers etc...) and effectively sell our inventory

 - Fluent in French, a good level of english is a plus




PROFILE

 - You have 5+ years of experience in digital ad sales with an outstanding track record in selling ad products to final clients.

 - Social media mobile experience is a strong plus.

 - You have a strong track record for outbound lead generation and business development.

 - A high degree of creativity, self-motivation, and drive.

 - An expert in managing a portfolio of clients and understanding the mobile ecosystem in a way that you can respond thoroughly and persuasively to the client’s needs and questions.

source_jobs.title: Product Manager - Paper.io 2
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT VOODOO

Founded in 2013, Voodoo is a tech company that creates mobile games and apps with a mission to entertain the world. Gathering 800 employees, 7 billion downloads, and over 200 million active users, Voodoo is the #3 mobile publisher worldwide in terms of downloads after Google and Meta. Our portfolio includes chart-topping games like Mob Control and Paper.io 2, alongside popular apps such as BeReal and Wizz.




TEAM

Our Gaming team is made up of hybrid-casual, casual, and mid-core experts. Our 'Core' games team supports internal and external studios worldwide in creating, developing, and launching new hit games, whilst our 'Live' games team focuses on delivering higher engagement on our existing and successful games.

Joining our Live games team means collaborating with gaming industry experts on globally renowned, enduring games while embracing exciting new entrepreneurial ventures. With over seven billion downloads worldwide and a portfolio of more than 10 resilient hybrid games generating more than $20m per year, we are the world's largest and most successful hybrid publisher.

You will be joining one of our Live Studios, working on Paper.io 2.




ROLE

 - Build and implement F2P systems that enhance player engagement and revenue, with a focus on progression, monetization, live events, and in-game economies.

 - Take full ownership of specifications, timelines, and outcomes, ensuring smooth execution and high-quality delivery.

 - Utilize A/B testing, retention metrics, and player data to refine and optimize features post-launch. Identify strengths, address weaknesses, and iterate for continuous improvement.

 - Collaborate closely with developers, artists, and analysts to ensure seamless feature rollouts. Maintain clear documentation, resolve technical challenges, and make strategic trade-offs to deliver the best possible player experience.

 - Prioritize development efforts under tight deadlines, balancing speed and quality to maximize impact.

 - Stay ahead of industry trends by monitoring competitors, analyzing market innovations, and rapidly adapting best practices.




PROFILE

 - Experience as PM, Product Owner, Game Designer, or Live Ops/Product Manager

 - Strong understanding of F2P mobile game mechanics

 - Able to write clear specs and align teams

 - High standards. We need someone who pushes the product forward and challenges weak ideas

 - Experience on a successful live game

 - Experience with competitive systems, leagues, rankings, seasons, battle passes, character collection, or upgrade systems

 - Experience on casual, hybridcasual, io, or mass-market games

 - Good understanding of IAP monetization, not only ads

 - Has seen what great live games do, for example Brawl Stars, Clash Royale, Monopoly Go, Stumble Guys, Subway Surfers, etc
   
   


BENEFITS

 - Best-in-class compensation

 - Other benefits according to the country you reside

source_jobs.title: Senior Backend Engineer (Golang) - BeReal
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT VOODOO

Founded in 2013, Voodoo is a tech company that creates mobile games and apps with a mission to entertain the world. Gathering 800 employees, 7 billion downloads, and over 200 million active users, Voodoo is the #3 mobile publisher worldwide in terms of downloads after Google and Meta. Our portfolio includes chart-topping games like Mob Control and Block Jam, alongside popular apps such as BeReal and Wizz.




TEAM

At BeReal, we are dedicated to authenticity in social media. By encouraging users to share unfiltered moments, we foster genuine connections and celebrate real life. We are now an international team of 100+ and have 40M+ monthly active users. Backed by Voodoo, our team is fully focused on scaling BeReal into an iconic social network used by hundreds of millions.




ROLE

We’ve built BeReal with a tiny technology team of world-class engineers and we intend to keep this mindset as we scale it to hundreds of millions of users. To achieve this, we ship new features faster than any other scaled social network while upgrading our infrastructure. We work in small teams of generalists and give each engineer high autonomy to make product related decisions.

 - Tackle exciting technical challenges, given the nature of our product, which experiences spikes of millions of users connecting within a 2-minute window.

 - Contribute to the development of a robust architecture capable of supporting massive scale as we attract new users and expand to new countries.

 - Collaborate with the product and engineering teams to create new features for the app.

 - Analyze trade-offs and address technical challenges related to key components of our backend.

 - Participate in code and design reviews.




OUR STACK

 - Infrastructure: GCP, Kubernetes, Pub/Sub, GitHub actions, and ArgoCD.

 - Backend: Go, Node.js (NestJS, Nx, Typescript)

 - Frontend: Swift (iOS), Kotlin (Android).

 - Database: Spanner, PostgreSQL, Redis.




PROFILE

 - You have 5+ years of experience working on API on distributed architecture.

 - You have a proven experience in Go and contribute to developing high volume API microservices.

 - You are self-reliant and have prior experience in a startup or similar environment.

 - You value teamwork and thrive on challenges.

 - You are proficient in English as our team is diverse and international.

 - You have a master degree in computer science or related field.

 - Most importantly, you believe in the project, are motivated, and eager to embark on an exciting and challenging journey.




BENEFITS

 - Competitive salary upon experience

 - Swile Lunch voucher

 - Gymlib (100% borne by Voodoo)

 - Premium healthcare coverage SideCare, for your family is 100% borne by Voodoo

 - Wellness activities in our Paris office

source_jobs.title: Product Data Analyst - Puzzle Games
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT VOODOO

Founded in 2013, Voodoo is a tech company that creates mobile games and apps with a mission to entertain the world. Gathering 800 employees, 7 billion downloads, and over 200 million active users, Voodoo is the #3 mobile publisher worldwide in terms of downloads after Google and Meta. Our portfolio includes chart-topping games like Mob Control and Block Jam, alongside popular apps such as BeReal and Wizz.

This position is Paris-based, with relocation support available.




TEAM

You will be an integral part of a newly established internal studio, a dynamic and focused team dedicated to one of our most promising prototype in scale. This studio is specifically chartered to improve this high-potential game up to the successful and market-ready title it is meant to become.




ROLE

 - Act as a trusted advisor on all things data, establishing best practices for data collection, analysis, and reporting.

 - Lead the analysis of large, complex datasets to understand player behavior and identify opportunities for growth in engagement, retention, and monetization.

 - Translate data insights into clear recommendations to inform game design, feature development, and the overall product roadmap.

 - Collaborate cross-functionally with game designers, product managers, and developers to ensure data-driven strategies are embedded throughout the game’s lifecycle.

 - Design, build, and maintain automated dashboards and reports, ensuring the entire team has access to critical metrics and insights.

 - Utilize A/B testing to evaluate and optimize game features and mechanics, driving measurable improvements in key performance indicators.




PROFILE

 - At least 3 years of analytical work experience in the gaming, tech or a data-driven industry, with a proven track record working in close connection with product teams.

 - Proficient with SQL and either R or Python, with a proven experience working with large and complex data sets.

 - Good knowledge of statistical analysis and concepts used for industry-standard methods like AB testing or forecasting.

 - Autonomous person with a strong analytical mind, problem-solving skills and strong attention to detail.

 - Ability to understand a business problem, turn it into an analytics/statistics problem and solve it using adequate methods.

 - Highly pragmatic mindset with the ability to quickly identify what needs to be focused on and what can be considered of lower priority.

 - Capacity to be the pro-active owner of the entire data chain for your game.




BENEFITS

 - Competitive salary

 - Premium healthcare (SideCare) for you and your family 100% borne by Voodoo

 - Swile Lunch voucher

 - Gymlib (100% borne by Voodoo)

 - Wellness activities in our Paris office

 - Child daycare facilities (Les Petits Chaperons rouges)

source_jobs.title: Customer Support Specialist
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT VOODOO

Founded in 2013, Voodoo is a tech company that creates mobile games and apps with a mission to entertain the world. Gathering 800 employees, 7 billion downloads, and over 200 million active users, Voodoo is the #3 mobile publisher worldwide in terms of downloads after Google and Meta. Our portfolio includes chart-topping games like Mob Control and Block Jam, alongside popular apps such as BeReal and Wizz.




TEAM

Our Gaming team is made up of hybrid-casual, casual and mid-core experts. Our 'Core' games team supports internal and external studios worldwide in creating, developing and launching new hit games, whilst our 'Live' games team focuses on delivering higher engagement on our existing and successful games.




ROLE

As the first fully dedicated Customer Support Specialist for our studio, you will play a pivotal role in establishing and leading our customer support efforts. Your mission is to build an outstanding player support experience that enhances satisfaction and retention. As an AI-first company, you'll be expected to leverage and integrate AI across as many processes as possible to keep driving speed and excellence. This is a part-time role (20 hours per week) with the opportunity to transition into a full-time position as the company and support function continue to grow.

 - Develop and implement customer support policies, procedures, and service standards that set the benchmark for player experience.

 - Build and lead the game's customer support efforts to provide exceptional service to our players, starting hands-on with day-to-day ticket resolution.

 - Analyze customer feedback to identify trends and insights, translating them into actionable recommendations for the game development team.

 - Work closely with the QA, data, community, and game development teams to ensure a cohesive and seamless player experience.

 - Create and maintain a knowledge base and self-service resources for players.

 - Manage and escalate complex or sensitive customer issues as needed.

 - Report regularly on customer support metrics, objectives, and key initiatives.




PROFILE

 - 2+ years of proven experience in customer support, preferably in the gaming or entertainment industry, or a tech-focused environment.

 - Passionate about gaming and deeply familiar with the needs of mobile game players.

 - Excellent communication and leadership skills, with the ability to motivate and guide a team when necessary.

 - Experience with customer support software and CRM systems; Zendesk experience is a strong plus.

 - Experience in customer support with native English-speaking customers.

 - Strong problem-solving skills with a natural ability to think analytically.

 - Comfortable using and integrating AI tools into workflows to drive efficiency and quality.




BENEFITS

• Best-in-class compensation

• Other benefits according to the country you reside

source_jobs.title: Playable Ads Strategist
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT VOODOO

Founded in 2013, Voodoo is a tech company that creates mobile games and apps with a mission to entertain the world. Gathering 800 employees, 7 billion downloads, and over 200 million active users, Voodoo is the #3 mobile publisher worldwide in terms of downloads after Google and Meta. Our portfolio includes chart-topping games like Mob Control and Block Jam, alongside popular apps such as BeReal and Wizz.



TEAM

Our Growth team helps maximize the potential of each Voodoo product within the ecosystem. It is split into several job expertise such as user acquisition, ad monetization, video ads, playable ads, and influencer marketers.

Being part of the Growth Team at Voodoo requires a lot of operational excellence and creativity in order to constantly adapt ourselves to stay ahead of the rest of the market.



Our core team mission in the Playable Ads team is to create engaging and interactive advertising experiences that captivate audiences and drive conversions. We work with playable developers and strategists who turn a game into a interactive ad experience. Your main mission will be to  produce high-performing ads by creating and uploading them to our different networks.



ROLE



To succeed in this role, you will need to have a good understanding of the casual mobile game market, a strong sense of gameplay and player engagement but also understand mobile advertising.

You will join a high-performing team and your goal will be to coordinate the creative production of playables with internal and external teams, improve performance and drive innovation.



Managing your own portfolio of games, you will:

 - Analyze playable performance to extract actionable insights and drive iterative improvements

 - Benchmark market trends and ad networks to uncover opportunities for ideation and creative differentiation

 - Define and craft playable briefs combining performance data, game feel expertise, and strong art direction (including asset guidance)

 - Monitor and optimize playable performance over time, shaping strategies to continuously improve engagement and conversion

 - Partner closely with cross-functional teams (Product, User Acquisition, Video, Analytics, etc.) to align ideation, production priorities, and overall playable strategy

 - Proactively identify and implement process and product improvements to elevate the efficiency and impact of playable development




PROFILE

 - You have at least 3 years of experience in the Creative Production segment

 - You have exceptional project management skills

 - You have strong ability to develop detailed playables briefs

 - You show strong interest and knowledge of the mobile apps industry and know how to benchmark and brainstorm innovative ideas

 - You have a good eye for design and is capable to articulate design decisions

 - You have previous experience in a creative or art direction role working with third party providers. Technical background in playables is highly appreciated

 - You have entrepreneurial mindset and can adapt to a high-paced environment

 - You are fluent in English




BENEFITS

 - Competitive salary and other benefits according to the country you reside in.



Full remote for candidates based abroad, with relocation to Paris subject to discussion. Hybrid for candidates based in France.

source_jobs.title: Legal Intern - Commercial/IP - PPI Internship
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT VOODOO

Voodoo is a tech company that creates mobile games and apps. With 7 billion downloads and over 200 million monthly active users, Voodoo is a leading mobile publisher worldwide in terms of downloads along with Google and Meta.

The company is one of the most impressive examples of hypergrowth in the ecosystem, backed by Goldman Sachs, Tencent, and GBL.

Voodoo is now a team of over 800 employees worldwide, we’re looking for talented individuals from across the globe to come and entertain the world with us.

We're looking for a Legal Intern in the Legal - Commercial & IP Department at Voodoo, running from July to December 2026




TEAM

Our Legal teams support the company’s performance and growth whilst putting people at the core of everything they do. As a French tech leader and global successful company, our Legal teams are constantly looking for ways to innovate and increase organization efficiency to keep Voodoo ahead of the market. Voodoo’s Corporate function is composed of five teams: HR, Talent acquisition, Legal, M&A and Finance, working together to drive Voodoo’s success.

You will be part of a whip-smart group of in-house lawyers and the projects and cases you take on challenge you to think big and differently. You will be part of a collaborative team that is ready to partner in initiatives that influence all aspects of the business and willing to go the extra mile.




ROLE

As a Legal Intern in the Commercial team, you will play a key role in supporting the operational teams by addressing their legal needs. Your responsibilities will include:

 - Managing IP protection and infringement issues, including trademark registrations, takedown requests, and pre-litigation or litigation cases in France and abroad.

 - Contributing actively to the company’s strategy to strengthen the protection of its games and apps in an evolving legal environment.

 - Drafting and reviewing various commercial agreements for publishing, marketing, and gaming teams. This includes publishing contracts, user acquisition and monetization agreements, service contracts, and partnership deals.




PROFILE

 - Fluency in English and French required

 - A first successful experience as intern in a law firm or in the legal commercial department of a company

 - Knowledge of IP law (copyright, trademarks, designs) is a plus

 - You master the Office Pack and demonstrate rigor, diplomacy and a sense of confidentiality

 - Sense of listening, availability, ability to work in a team, and a good sense of humor will be great assets for a successful journey at Voodoo !




BENEFITS

 - Swile Lunch voucher

 - Gymlib (100% borne by Voodoo)

 - Wellness activities in our Paris office

 - Remote days

With Paper.io2, we’re building an iconic game that players will never forget!

We're a small team of excellent people who take care of everything from ideas to testing, and we intend to grow while maintaining our high standards.

 - Conduct comprehensive manual testing of our mobile games to identify and document crucial defects, taking ownership of the entire QA process to assure quality and user experience.

 - Creating processes and tools to improve the overall quality of the game.

 - Follow the technical KPIs of our live games and propose strategies to continuously improve them.

 - Coordinate closely with design and development teams, understanding game mechanics and providing essential feedback to improve and refine the product.

 - Design test plans for new features and releases.

 - Prioritize and execute testing tasks efficiently at different development stages, aligning with project timelines and objectives while independently addressing and resolving issues found.

 - Foster an open feedback culture, actively participating in constructive dialogue with team members to facilitate collaboration and innovation.

 - Work with our central tech teams in quality-related initiatives.




PROFILE

 - 3+ years as a QA Engineer in Mobile Games, demonstrating ownership and successful project completion.

 - Strong problem-solving skills with the ability to take up tasks from start to finish with little assistance and identify and address issues independently and effectively.

 - Reliable self-starter and team player, capable of taking responsibility and contributing positively to team dynamics.

 - Passion for mobile games with insight into the player's perspective and expectations.

source_jobs.title: UI/UX Designer - Cortex’ Studio

With elegant word and logic challenges, it's a daily habit that actually makes you smarter. You’ll grow fast and make a real impact on a product loved by thousands.

You’ll design and iterate on clean, intuitive, and polished user flows—from core gameplay to monetization and onboarding. Your work will directly shape how players feel and interact with The Almanac every day.

 - Lead the end-to-end design of intuitive, beautiful, and efficient user experiences

source_jobs.title: CTO / VP Engineering - BeReal
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT VOODOO

Founded in 2013, Voodoo is a tech company that creates mobile games and apps with a mission to entertain the world. Gathering 800 employees, 7 billion downloads, and over 200 million active users, Voodoo is the #3 mobile publisher worldwide in terms of downloads after Google and Meta. Our portfolio includes chart-topping games like Mob Control and Block Jam, alongside popular apps such as BeReal and Wizz.




TEAM

BeReal stands for authenticity in social media: one notification a day, unfiltered photos and videos, real friends. 40M+ people use BeReal every month, and they all post at the same moment. Since joining Voodoo, BeReal has returned to growth with a healthy business model and $50M in revenue this year. The opportunity is clear: people want an alternative to Instagram and TikTok. Our ambition is to make BeReal the leader in authentic social, used by hundreds of millions.




ROLE

You will lead BeReal’s engineering organization: 12 squads, around 80 people across tech and product, three codebases (iOS, Android, Backend). You will report directly to BeReal’s CEO. Your mandate: app stability at spike scale, faster squads without regressions, infrastructure cost under control, and a higher talent bar.



What you'll do:

 - Own the stability of a system where millions of users post within the same two minutes, every day

 - Run 12 squads across three codebases: release discipline, feature flags, platform, developer experience

 - Own infrastructure cost as a P&L line: GCP, Cloud Spanner, media delivery at scale

 - Complete our Node.js to Go migration without slowing delivery

 - Hire exceptional engineers, develop them, and hold the bar high

 - Set technical strategy with the CEO and product leadership




OUR STACK

GCP, Kubernetes, Terraform, ArgoCD, Datadog, Fastly · Go (some legacy Node.js), Cloud Spanner, Redis, PostgreSQL, Pub/Sub · Swift/SwiftUI, Kotlin · BigQuery, Airflow, DBT, Amplitude




PROFILE

 - 12+ years in engineering, 6+ leading leaders, in organizations of 80–200+ engineers

 - You scaled a high-traffic consumer product or comparable high-throughput infrastructure

 - Architect-level depth: you hold your own with staff engineers on distributed-systems trade-offs. No coding test.

 - You have built regression-prevention systems for many teams shipping in parallel

 - You lead distributed teams through clear writing, metrics, and fast async decisions

 - A plus: consumer social, camera or media products, native mobile organizations




BENEFITS

 - Competitive salary upon experience

 - Swile Lunch voucher

 - Gymlib (100% borne by Voodoo)

 - Premium healthcare coverage SideCare, for your family 100% borne by Voodoo

 - Wellness activities in our Paris office

source_jobs.title: HR Operations Specialist
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT VOODOO

Founded in 2013, Voodoo is a tech company that creates mobile games and apps with a mission to entertain the world. Gathering 800 employees, 7 billion downloads, and over 200 million active users, Voodoo is the #3 mobile publisher worldwide in terms of downloads after Google and Meta. TEAM

Our Corporate teams support the company’s performance and growth whilst putting people at the core of everything they do. As a French tech leader and global successful company, our Corporate teams are constantly looking for ways to innovate and increase organization efficiency to keep Voodoo ahead of the market. Voodoo’s Corporate function is composed of five teams: HR, Talent Acquisition, Legal, M&A, and Finance, working together to drive Voodoo’s success.



As a Junior HR Operations Specialist, you will play a vital role in supporting the HR team with day-to-day operations and ensuring an exceptional employee experience.






RESPONSIBILITIES

 - Own the excellent delivery of operational HR lifecycle in all countries where Voodoo is present from onboarding to offboarding, including preparation of appropriate documentation, immigration compliance or implementation of processes.

 - Leverage AI tools to automate HR processes and enhance employee experience.

 - Maintain compliance with policies and legal requirements by managing relationships with relevant administrative stakeholders.

 - Own the maintenance and updates of employee data in the HR Information System (BambooHR), ensuring accuracy and timely adjustments for any changes in employee status.

 - Support payroll data processing, including tracking bonuses, salary increases, and sick leave.

 - Oversee the administration of employee benefits to ensure compliance and accuracy.

 - Proactively propose and implement AI-driven solutions to streamline HR operations and improve data accuracy.

 - Stay up-to-date with emerging AI tech in HR and recommend innovative tools or features.

 - Participate in the strengthening of our HR Operations, understanding what matters to our People and ensure our function is high-performing notably providing first-line support for HR inquiries through the ticketing system, ensuring timely and accurate resolution of employee issues and escalating when necessary.






PROFILE

 - 1-2 years progressive experience in an HR role (apprenticeship or junior-level experience in HR operations or administration is a plus)

 - Full proficiency in French and English

 - Strong interest and hands-on experience with AI tools

 - Proactive mindset with ability to propose AI-driven improvements in operational workflows

 - Comfortable working in a fast-evolving, AI-enabled environment and eager to experiment with new technologies

 - Understands basic HR processes and be eager to learn more about compliance, documentation, and payroll coordination

 - Demonstrates strong attention to detail, organizational and problem-solving skills

 - Problem-solving enthusiasm: you go beyond identifying issues or challenges and focus on how to address them, leveraging AI when relevant

 - Great communication skills across languages and cultures with an ability to build trust-based relationships at all levels of the organization

 - Proactive, adaptable, and eager to learn and grow within a dynamic HR environment

 - Team player and a good sense of humor are definitely a plus

BENEFITS

 - Collaborative team player who adapts quickly to change and ambiguity.
   


BENEFITS

 - Best-in-class compensation

 - Other benefits based on your country of residence

source_jobs.title: Product Designer - BeReal
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT BEREAL

At BeReal, we are dedicated to authenticity in social media. By encouraging users to share unfiltered moments, we foster genuine connections and celebrate real life. We are now an international team of 100+ and have 40M+ monthly active users. Backed by Voodoo, our team is fully focused on scaling BeReal into an iconic social network used by hundreds of millions.




ROLE

BeReal’s product team is a small group of high-performers reporting directly to the CEO. We operate at the intersection of data science, engineering, design, and operations. Highly autonomous and skilled across multiple areas, each member of the team is expected to identify opportunities, design high-impact solutions, drive implementation, and assess results.



 - Conduct qualitative and quantitative research of user behavior and needs. Identify key problems and opportunities

 - Propose pragmatic solutions and estimate business impact.

 - Contribute to prioritizing initiatives.

 - From wire-framing to designing end-to-end flows and prototypes, design features that solve problems in a simple and elegant way while taking care of every small detail.

 - Identify key metrics your solutions should improve and take ownership for achieving success.

 - Implement, test, and iterate with the technical team.

 - Contribute to building and improving our design system.




PROFILE

 - You’re passionate about scaling social consumer apps.

 - You’re plugged into GenZ’s drives and desires. You’re obsessed with understanding user needs in detail.

 - You’re highly driven, autonomous, and results-oriented.

 - You can both hack together a quick prototype and implement a scalable design system.

 - You love making delightful features but also are super pragmatic about having a substantial business impact.

 - You understand the technical implications of your design decisions.

 - You are fluent in English




BENEFITS

 - Competitive salary upon experience

 - Swile Lunch voucher

 - Gymlib (100% borne by Voodoo)

 - Premium healthcare coverage SideCare, for your family is 100% borne by Voodoo

 - Wellness activities in our Paris office

source_jobs.title: Legal Intern - Labor Law - Stage Droit Social - PPI Internship
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT VOODOO

Founded in 2013, Voodoo is a tech company that creates mobile games and apps with a mission to entertain the world. Gathering 800 employees, 7 billion downloads, and over 200 million active users, Voodoo is the #3 mobile publisher worldwide in terms of downloads after Google and Meta. Our portfolio includes chart-topping games like Mob Control and Block Jam, alongside popular apps such as BeReal and Wizz.

Please note that we have rotating internship opportunities available every six months, providing ongoing opportunities for new talent to join our team.




TEAM

Our Corporate teams support the company’s performance and growth whilst putting people at the core of everything they do. As a French tech leader and global successful company, our Corporate teams are constantly looking for ways to innovate and increase organization efficiency to keep Voodoo ahead of the market.




ROLE

Voodoo’s Corporate function is composed of five teams: HR, Talent Acquisition, Legal, M&A and Finance, working together to drive Voodoo’s success.

Responsibilities

 - Support the HR team to ensure compliance with labor regulations within the organization in France and abroad (> 20 countries)

 - Help performing legal analysis of operational practices

 - Provide legal support to our HR Specialist with respect to onboarding / offboarding and daily labor matters

 - Prepare regular updates on legal changes

 - Map legal obligations towards employee representatives (CSE) in particular with respect to regular consultation processes

 - Prepare invites, agendas and as the case may be information notes to be delivered to employee reps; attend CSE meetings

 - Participate in the preparation of company collective agreements or policies






CONTRACT

 - 6 months internship starting in January 2026.

 - For Bar Student PPI more than welcome.

 - No relocation program.




PROFILE

 - Fluent both in French and English

 - A first successful experience as an intern in Labor Law and a very good knowledge of French labor regulations

 - You master the Office Pack and demonstrate rigor, diplomacy, and a sense of confidentiality

 - Sense of listening, availability, ability to work in a team, and a good sense of humor will be great assets for a successful journey at Voodoo






BENEFITS

 - Competitive gratification

 - Lunch Vouchers : You will receive €10 per working day with Swile https://www.swile.co/fr-fr to spend in restaurants and supermarkets.

 - Transportation : Reimbursement of transportation costs up to 50%

 - Remote Policy: You may work remotely every Monday and Friday.

source_jobs.description:
ABOUT BEREAL

At BeReal, we are dedicated to authenticity in social media. By encouraging users to share unfiltered moments, we foster genuine connections and celebrate real life. We are now an international team of 100+ and have 40M+ monthly active users. Backed by Voodoo, our team is fully focused on scaling BeReal into an iconic social network used by hundreds of millions.




ROLE

BeReal’s product team is a small group of high-performers reporting directly to the CEO. We operate at the intersection of data science, engineering, design, and operations. Highly autonomous and skilled across multiple areas, each member of the team is expected to identify opportunities, design high-impact solutions, drive implementation, and assess results.

 - Partner with a small team of engineers & designers to come up with, build, test, and scale new high-impact features.

 - Combine analytics and user research to identify user drives, fuel ideation, and lead product improvements.

 - Contribute to high-level strategic decisions. Help define short and long-term roadmaps.

 - Identify key metrics and take ownership for improving them.




PROFILE

 - You’re passionate about B2C mobile apps and have a proven track record of building meaningful products.

 - You’re hyper analytical: you obsess over product metrics, test your hypotheses rigorously, and make data-driven decisions.

 - You can both hack together a quick prototype and articulate a long-term product vision.

 - You have an intuitive feel for UI and UX. You have basic design skills in Figma.

 - You’re highly driven and autonomous.

 - You’re fluent in English (French is a plus)




BENEFITS

 - Competitive salary upon experience

 - Swile Lunch voucher

 - Gymlib (100% borne by Voodoo)

 - Premium healthcare coverage SideCare, for your family 100% borne by Voodoo

 - Wellness activities in our Paris office

source_jobs.title: UI/UX Designer - Hole.io
source_jobs.description:
About Voodoo

Founded in 2013, Voodoo is a tech company that creates mobile games and apps with a mission to entertain the world. Gathering 800 employees, 7 billion downloads, and over 200 million active users, Voodoo is the #3 mobile publisher worldwide in terms of downloads after Google and Meta. Our portfolio includes chart-topping games like Mob Control and Block Jam, alongside popular apps such as BeReal and Wizz.



Team

Our Gaming team is made up of hybrid-casual, casual, and mid-core experts. Our 'Core' games team supports internal and external studios worldwide in creating, developing, and launching new hit games, whilst our 'Live' games team focuses on delivering higher engagement on our existing and successful games.



Joining our Live games team means collaborating with gaming industry experts on globally renowned, enduring games while embracing exciting new entrepreneurial ventures. With over seven billion downloads worldwide and a portfolio of more than 10 resilient hybrid games generating more than $20m per year, we are the world's largest and most successful hybrid publisher.

You will be joining one of our Live Studios, working on Hole.io. https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?hl=en&id=io.voodoo.holeio



Role

 - Support the Art director in the ideation and execution of the game’s vision.

 - Design and oversee integration of a high-quality, scalable UI.

 - Develop and optimize UX flows of new and existing features.

 - Create and maintain a comprehensive UI Style Bible and reusable component libraries.

 - Create high-quality 2D assets (menus, HUDs, buttons, icons, illustrations, etc) and ensure optimal performance across mobile devices.

 - Utilize Figma to create wireframes, prototypes, and high-fidelity mockups

 - Work with Game Designers and the Product Team to ensure UI supports gameplay and accessibility goals.

 - Iterate quickly based on team feedback and live user data.

 - Propose creative ideas to boost player engagement and improve the user experience.
   

Profile

 - 4+ years experience as a UI/UX Artist on shipped mobile games.

 - You must have experience designing in Figma.

 - Excellent design skills, with a keen eye for visual hierarchy, composition, and readability.

 - Experience with A/B testing interfaces or working with LiveOps features.

 - A keen eye for emerging mobile game trends with the ability to creatively deconstruct and learn from success cases.

 - Ability to design, document and execute a consistent UI visual language.

 - Experience collaborating with cross-functional remote teams.

 - Fluent in English.
   

Benefits

 - Best-in-class compensation

 - Other benefits based on your country of residence

notes: Voodoo is a large mobile game and app publisher with a diverse portfolio of products. The company has a strong focus on product development and growth, with a large team of engineers, designers, and product managers.
